name: AML Watcher
description: AML Watcher offers a compliance API for sanctions, PEP, adverse media and ongoing monitoring. It covers 220+ countries and integrates into SaaS platforms, banks and fintechs needing streamlined AML workflows.

seo.title: AML Watcher — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: AML Watcher: AML Watcher offers a compliance API for sanctions, PEP, adverse media and ongoing monitoring. It covers 220+ countries and integrates into SaaS pla

when_to_use: Adverse media screening API for fintech customer onboarding
Sanctions list checks against OFAC, UN, EU in real time
PEP screening for wealth management client onboarding
Ongoing AML monitoring for existing customer portfolios
SaaS platform integration for white-label compliance workflows

pros: Coverage across 220+ countries for sanctions and PEP
REST API fits SaaS and fintech onboarding flows
Ongoing monitoring included, not a separate upsell
Adverse media screening bundled with core lists
cons: Smaller brand than Dow Jones or Refinitiv sources
False positive rates can be high on common names
Data provenance for adverse media less documented
Pricing tiers not transparent without sales contact
review.verdict: Budget-friendly sanctions and PEP API with broad coverage, solid fit when Refinitiv is overkill.
review.best_for: SaaS platforms and mid-market fintechs needing global AML screening at a predictable cost
review.not_for: Tier-1 banks requiring audited, named-source watchlist feeds with formal SLAs

lock_in.reason: Sanctions data lists portable but workflows proprietary

developer_experience.reason: REST API, docs focused on compliance integrations
